items.creator: Kate Park
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Australia forces Big Tech firms to pay for news or face a 2.25% tax
items.content: The more deals platforms make with media outlets, the less they pay. If enough agreements go through, that effective rate drops to 1.5%, which could generate between A$200 million and A$250 million back into Australian journalism.
